description: Legal record (#5) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 3r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 20 Sivan [5320] AM (1560 CE). By writing תאריכו, the scribe implies it's the same year as the previous entry on the folio. Farjallah b. ʿAbd al-Bāqī al-Levi settles a debt of 10 gold jadīd (ashrafī) with his maternal uncle Avraham b. David ha-Levi. The scribe Abraham b. Yeshʿia Tawrizī signs multiple times practicing his signature. The second signature is also from a member of the Tawrizī family, but the first part of the name is unclear. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
